examples:
Command Example
!rtir-get-ticket ticket-id=1
Raw Output
{
"CF.{Customer}": "",
"CF.{How Reported}": "Email",
"CF.{IP}": "8.8.8.8",
"CF.{Reporter Type}": "",

!rtir-get-ticket ticket-id=1
Raw Output
{
"CF.{Customer}": "",
"CF.{How Reported}": "Email",
"CF.{IP}": "8.8.8.8",
"CF.{Reporter Type}": "",
"Created": "Mon Jul 09 03:25:47 2018",
name: rtir-get-ticket

outputs.description: Linked ticket ID. RTIR.Ticket.ID Ticket ID.
outputs.name: RTIR.Ticket.LinkedTo.ID

outputs.description: Ticket subject. RTIR.Ticket.Created Ticket creation date.
outputs.name: RTIR.Ticket.Subject

outputs.description: Ticket priority (0-100). RTIR.Ticket.InitialPriority Ticket initial priority (0-100).
outputs.name: RTIR.Ticket.Priority

outputs.description: Ticket final priority (0-100). RTIR.Ticket.Queue Ticket queue.
outputs.name: RTIR.Ticket.FinalPriority

outputs.description: Ticket owner. RTIR.Ticket.IP Ticket custom field - IP address.
outputs.name: RTIR.Ticket.Owner

outputs.description: Ticket custom field - How the ticket was reported. RTIR.Ticket.Customer Ticket custom field - Customer.
outputs.name: RTIR.Ticket.HowReported
